channel.title: My Blog
channel.description: A personal blog powered by iw-generator

item.title: Code Highlighting Demo
item.description:
--- title: "Code Highlighting Demo" date: 2025-07-12 category: Test tags: [code, highlight, test] ---
# Code Highlighting Demo
iw-generator supports syntax highlighting for multiple languages using Pygments.
## Python

A step-by-step guide to building your own static site generator with Python.

item.title: Hello World
item.description:
--- title: "Hello World" date: 2025-07-10 category: Blog tags: [introduction, blog] ---
# Hello World
Welcome to my blog! This is the first post powered by **iw-generator**.
## What is iw-generator?
iw-generator is a general-purpose Markdown static site generator that supports multiple themes:
